classes.name: Sentinel
classes.description: A warrior empowered by time magic and divine might.

masteries.name: Void Knight
masteries.description: Harnesses void energy and temporal echoes to devastate enemies with massive void damage.

skills.name: Void Cleave
skills.description: Strikes with void-infused cleave, creating temporal echoes.

skills.name: Erasing Strike
skills.description: A powerful blow that erases enemies from time.

skills.name: Anomaly
skills.description: Creates a temporal anomaly that pulls enemies and rewinds time.

skills.name: Devouring Orb
skills.description: Summons an orbiting void orb that consumes nearby enemies.

skills.name: Volatile Reversal
skills.description: Rewinds your position and health to a previous state.

nodes.name: Decisive Strikes
nodes.description: Your attacks deal more damage on first hit.

nodes.name: Void Rift
nodes.description: Your void attacks tear rifts in reality, dealing extra void damage.

nodes.name: Endless Hunger
nodes.description: Life leech is massively increased but max health is reduced.

nodes.name: Executioner
nodes.description: More damage against enemies below 35% life.

nodes.name: Whirlwind
nodes.description: Cast speed and attack speed both increased.

nodes.name: Berserker
nodes.description: More damage but take more damage.

masteries.name: Forge Guard
masteries.description: Forges weapons and armor mid-combat, empowering them with elemental and physical force.

skills.name: Shield Rush
skills.description: Charge forward with your shield, knocking back enemies.

skills.name: Forge Strike
skills.description: Strike with a magically forged weapon.

skills.name: Molten Bullet
skills.description: Fire a molten projectile that ignites enemies.

skills.name: Warpath
skills.description: Spin continuously to slash all nearby enemies.

skills.name: Hammer Throw
skills.description: Hurl a hammer that bounces between enemies.

skills.name: Judgment
skills.description: Call down divine judgment on all nearby enemies.

skills.name: Holy Aura
skills.description: Emit a holy aura that empowers you and allies.

skills.name: Rive
skills.description: A rapid melee attack with a powerful charged variant.

skills.name: Consecrated Ground
skills.description: Consecrate an area, damaging enemies who enter.

skills.name: Rebuke
skills.description: Retaliate against all enemies who strike you.

skills.name: Lightning Blast
skills.description: Unleash a powerful bolt of lightning.

skills.name: Glacier
skills.description: Call down pillars of ice to freeze and shatter enemies.

skills.name: Static Orb

skills.name: Flame Ward
